2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch renames the function sunrpc_cache_pipe_upcall_timeout() to sunrpc_cache_upcall_warn(). The original function name was misleading as it didn't actually handle timeouts, but rather warned if there were no listeners. This change clarifies the purpose of the function and makes its name more descriptive. The rename affects 6 files in total, with changes made to various parts of the codebase that call this function.
